privileged_info_summary: The docker_cron_observability task uses a synthetic environment created by setup_task.sh. The container is named db-backup and located at project directory /home/ga/projects/db-backup. The backup script outputs the success message 'Backup payload delivered successfully' when executed. A success marker file is created at /tmp/last_backup_success after successful execution. The task requires the API_KEY environment variable to be properly inherited by the cron job, with the value production_secret_123. All metadata fields in task.json correctly describe the synthetic task setup.
